findings: Stuck detection uses claim-file mtime > 120s threshold (hardcoded)
No worker heartbeat/output-based detection; only tmux pane process check
False positives: legitimate long tasks flagged after 120s
False negatives: hung worker still shows active if bash/python process present
TOCTOU race on orphan requeue: result may appear between check and mv
Alert suppression uses substring matching; can suppress for overlapping task IDs
Commander heartbeat (180s) only applies to commander processes, not regular workers
